svg.title: Illustrative Safe Exec diff review
svg.desc: An illustrative SVG mockup of the Safe Exec suspicious edit rollback, diff review, approval modal, and recent activity. It is not a real VS Code screenshot.

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: Safe Exec reapplies captured ranges first. Whole-document replace is fallback only.

g.text: Reasons: changed 212 characters; used 4 separate edit ranges; matched a protected path rule

text.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif

g.text: This is a post-change rollback-and-reapply flow. Review the diff before reapplying.

g.text: If the document changes while approval is pending, Safe Exec keeps the rollback.

g.text: Local per-workspace history for approvals, denials, conflicts, degraded replays, and failures. Useful for review, not tamper-proof.
